name: Brave Search
summary: Live, privacy-respecting web search via Brave's independent index.
description: General web search returning fresh results from Brave's own index -- a dedicated, keyed search backend, useful for stronger retrieval and to pair with the web-research skill. Uses the Brave Search MCP server + a Brave Search API key (paid per query).

requires.label: A Brave Search API key (paid; re-check current per-query pricing at signup)
